description: Lock mythology_and_cosmology to source-backed early Mesopotamian mythic cosmologies, not generic prehistoric shamanism or unsourced symbolic communication.

checks.reason: The scoped claim is anchored to Mesopotamian written mythic evidence in and after the third millennium BCE.
Surviving written mythic texts preserve older oral-traditional narrative systems.
Proto-cuneiform and early cuneiform are the Mesopotamian documentary lineage leading into the surviving mythological tablets.
Generic symbolic communication is broader than the written mythological corpus supported by the sources.
The scoped Mesopotamian written mythic-cosmology node must not inherit an unsourced prehistoric shamanism claim.
A direct writing edge currently reintroduces a calendar-astronomy-writing cycle; proto_writing carries the non-cyclic documentary lineage.
